title: ICPC South America / Brazil — First Phase
description: Bronze medalist, placing 3rd out of 25 teams at the 2024 ICPC South America / Brazil First Phase — the world's most prestigious collegiate programming contest.

title: SBC Programming Marathon — Zero Stage
description: Placed 166th out of 807 competitors in the 2024 Zero Stage of the SBC Programming Marathon, hosted on Beecrowd.

title: ICPC South America / Brazil — First Phase
description: Placed 302nd out of 664 teams at the 2023 ICPC South America / Brazil First Phase.

title: Coder Rerun 2.0 — IEEE UEL
description: Finished 6th out of 23 teams at the Coder Rerun 2.0 contest organized by IEEE UEL.

title: IBM — Behind the Code
description: Reached the top 100 in two challenges of IBM's Behind the Code marathon: 23rd in challenge 04 (Grupo Boticário) and 83rd in challenge 01 (Grupo Pão de Açúcar).
